post.summary: Returns the source diff of a package.
post.description:
Without parameters, return the diff of the last change made to the package.
Despite using the method `POST`, this endpoint doesn't alter any data.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Set to `1` to expand any link before diffing.

parameters.name: meta
parameters.description: Set to `1` to diff meta data instead of sources.

parameters.name: missingok
parameters.description: Set to `1` to diff against an inexistent origin.

parameters.name: nodiff
parameters.description: Set to `1` to only show changed files, and not details inside files.

parameters.name: olinkrev
parameters.description: Link revision of the origin package.

Without parameters. One character change.description: Diff of adding an exclamation mark.
Without parameters. One character change.value:
spec files:
-----------
--- hello_world.spec
+++ hello_world.spec
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@
 %build
 cat > hello_world.sh <<EOF
 #!/usr/bin/bash
-echo Hello world
+echo Hello world!
 EOF

 %install

With view=unified.value:
Index: hello_world.spec
===================================================================
--- hello_world.spec (revision 2)
+++ hello_world.spec (revision 3)
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@
 %build
 cat > hello_world.sh <<EOF
 #!/usr/bin/bash
-echo Hello world
+echo Hello world!
 EOF

 %install

With view=xml.value:

  <new project="home:Admin" package="hello_world" rev="3" srcmd5="672795214454d08abd9143893d673e38"/>
  <files>
    <file state="changed">
      <old name="hello_world.spec" md5="dcd026ba76f1723ea8292ad13579aa84" size="463"/>
      <new name="hello_world.spec" md5="40f5f87134e806a20123821a3442f176" size="464"/>
      <diff lines="9">@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@
 %build
 cat > hello_world.sh <<EOF

+echo Hello world!
 EOF

 %install

Not Boolean.description: Passing a value different than `0` or `1` to `nodiff`, for example.

412.description:
Precondition Failed

With `cacheonly=1`, and the diff is still not cached.
